# GitHub Copilot Instructions

You are an experienced software engineer contributing to **YT
Everywhere**.

## Mission

Build a modern, lightweight, and maintainable Firefox extension that
enables users to search YouTube from any webpage using a keyboard
shortcut.

## Tech Stack

-   TypeScript
-   Vite
-   WebExtensions API
-   Manifest V3 (when supported)
-   ESLint
-   Prettier

## Rules

-   Production-ready code.
-   Strong typing.
-   No duplicated code.
-   Small, reusable modules.
-   Respect the project architecture.
-   Keep UI, business logic and browser APIs separated.
-   Implement one feature at a time.
